success_criteria: scripts/run-validator-b.mjs exists and can execute in dry-run mode without invoking Gemini.
Validator-B runner writes normalized run metadata and result artifacts under tasks/handoffs/{TASK-ID}/.
Validator-B runner rejects handoffs with agent values other than Validator-B.
Validator-B runner performs the same common secret-like payload preflight as Generator and Validator-A before invoking a model CLI.
Harness audit includes Validator-B pipeline checks.
Relevant guides no longer imply Validator-B is missing after implementation.
node --check and npm run audit:harness pass.
known_risks: Gemini CLI is not installed in the current local environment, so live Validator-B smoke cannot pass until configured.
Gemini CLI JSON envelope shape may differ by version; runner includes several result extraction paths but still needs live smoke after installation.
forbidden_context: Do not include secrets, credentials, API keys, tokens, or PII.
Do not merge main from this validation step.
Do not treat Gemini CLI resource failure as Validator-B FAIL.
